name: stonksbot

evidenceGates.note: Strategy/backtest surface changed -> attach walk-forward + cost-sensitivity evidence before shipping (fires only after install-hooks.mjs and once the surface exists).

notes: M0 COMPLETE (closed in PR #7 at main@14dadb4; current main after PR #8 status/vault sync is 9e5fcff; foundations PR #6; owner decision 2026-06-29) - research-backtest is the only active profile and has the M0 Python skeleton (config loader, SQLite DDL/bootstrap, fail-closed account-guard stub) with ruff/pytest verification and CI (.github/workflows/ci.yml, verify + harness gates on PR/main). Current M1.1 work is schema hardening plus MOEX ISS read-only data leg only: no SDK, token, broker order placement, Telegram execution, live/sandbox trading, or dependencies for dormant broker-adapter/execution-confirm until explicitly activated. Project verify is ruff + pytest for the M0/M1 Python surface; harness/gate checks still exist via check-kit, test-gates, secret-scan, and evidence-gate. broadTaskTriggers extend the fan-out nudge with trading-domain terms (RU+EN). forbiddenTerms catch stack-name leakage from sibling agent-kits (web-frontend / desktop-GUI / 3D tooling) - stonksbot is a Python backend trading lab. The git hooks are installed and live: pre-commit and pre-push run on every commit/push (worktrees inherit the main repo .git/hooks). evidenceGates fire only after tools/install-hooks.mjs is installed and the strategy/backtest surface exists.
